overall.description: Game engine footage from a ship simulator depicting a first-person bridge view as the vessel transitions from dense fog to clear night conditions. The camera remains fixed inside the bridge as the ship moves steadily forward through calm waters, with functional navigation monitors displaying radar and nautical charts.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating through dense fog

events.description: dense fog dissipates revealing clear night visibility ahead

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems while piloting through low-visibility fog conditions

forward deck of the vessel barely visible through heavy fog
dense white fog obscuring visibility beyond the ship's bow
metal safety railing on the port side of the bridge deck
metal safety railing on the starboard side of the bridge deck

segments.scene_description: View from inside a ship's bridge enveloped in dense maritime fog. The navigation monitors glow with radar and chart data while the bow is barely visible through the white haze. The vessel moves steadily forward through the obscured waters with limited visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge on open water at night

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady course through calm waters with clear night visibility

entered.detail: dark calm water visible surrounding the ship's bow and extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The fog has completely cleared, revealing a serene night scene from the ship's bridge. The vessel's bow is now clearly visible cutting through calm dark waters, with the navigation monitors continuing to display the course along the coastline. The ship maintains steady forward motion through the open water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a continuous first-person view from a ship's bridge as a dense maritime fog gradually lifts to reveal a clear, serene night. It begins enveloped in a thick white haze that obscures the horizon, leaving only the glowing radar and nautical charts of the navigation monitors to guide the vessel forward. As the ship maintains its steady course, the oppressive fog begins to dissipate and thin out. The scene then opens completely to reveal the ship's bow cutting through calm, dark waters under a clear night sky. Finally, the view expands to show the open sea and the distant coastline as the vessel continues its forward motion through the now-transparent air.
